ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biogeochemical_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the biogeochemical parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of environment where the parameter is measured (e.g., pelagic) */,
  "typical_range" TEXT /* Typical range of values for the parameter */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the parameter is measured */,
  "analysis_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for analyzing the parameter */,
  "instrument_used" TEXT /* Instrument used to measure the parameter */,
  "quality_control_procedure" TEXT /* Procedure used for quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biogeochemical parameter being measured */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth of the measurement */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Username of the researcher who uploaded the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES biogeochemical_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES researchers ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., institution, department) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name given to the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Username of the researcher who uploaded the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_measurements" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name given to the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_category_links" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biogeochemical parameter */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id", "category_id")
)
